title: Fix PR 17 Cursor backend issues
objective: On PR 17 branch claude/tender-darwin, fix the Cursor backend exec handling and any associated test mismatches so the PR is merge-ready.
instructions: Work in the existing PR worktree at /Users/yashturkar/Workspace/control-tower/.claude/worktrees/tender-darwin on branch claude/tender-darwin.
Fix the Cursor exec failure where _cursor_exec() assumes result.stdout is always a string and crashes on None.
Resolve the implementation/test mismatch around the expected Cursor headless invocation so the contract is clear and the tests pass.
Do not broaden scope beyond the review blockers unless required to make the targeted tests pass cleanly.
Run focused tests first, then the relevant broader bootstrap/backend test suite if feasible, and report exactly what passed.
constraints: Do not perform Git operations beyond what is needed to inspect state; Git-master will handle commit/push.
Stay within the PR branch worktree and do not touch the main worktree.
expected_outputs: ResultPacket summarizing code changes, tests run, and whether the PR blockers are resolved.
definition_of_done: Cursor exec no longer crashes on None stdout.
The Cursor backend contract and its test are aligned.
Relevant tests pass in the PR worktree.
